tracks.rawText: 2:20Studio Selectionv5.5CoverReggaeton track at 90 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm with a heavy, rounded kick drum and sharp, crisp snares, A syncopated, staccato synth pluck riff provides the melodic hook, accompanied by a deep sub-bass that follows the kick pattern, Male vocals are processed with subtle pitch correction and light reverb, Occasional record scratch effects and vocal ad-libs punctuate the transitions, The harmonic structure is built on a repetitive minor chord progression played by a percussive synth padPublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection
